title: Board
description: Canonical enum definitions shared by the Go dispatcher/board package and the Python worker. Lane, Column, and BlockKind are defined here as the single source of truth; other schemas should $ref these $defs rather than redeclaring the enums.

Lane.description: The DAC profile a worker runs under for an issue.

Column.description: Board column (kanban state) an issue occupies.

BlockKind.description: The reason a run is blocked; present on a worker result iff outcome=="blocked".
